title: CandleRuntime adapter scaffolding (candle-core + candle-transformers)
goal: Create the CandleRuntime adapter module: public adapter struct, candle-core + candle-transformers dependency wiring, ModelRuntime impl skeleton, Device selection (CPU/CUDA/Metal), tokenizer integration via tokenizers crate. Subsequent MTs fill in real implementations (activation hooks, SSMs).
expected_diff_shape: New directory src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/ with mod.rs, adapter.rs (CandleRuntime struct + skeleton ModelRuntime impl), device.rs (Device selector), tokenizer.rs (HF tokenizers wrapper); registry update.
unblock_conditions: MT-061..MT-070 trait + sub-traits + registry + LlmClient routing merged.
implementation_notes: Per AC-CANDLE-ADAPTER (spec §4.6.2): CandleRuntime wraps candle-core + candle-transformers; required path for hook-requiring techniques (activation steering, refusal vector, CAA) and for subquadratic architectures (Mamba2, RWKV v5-v7). CandleRuntime struct: `pub struct CandleRuntime { models: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<ModelId, CandleModelHandle>>>, device: candle_core::Device, tokenizer_cache: Arc<RwLock<HashMap<ModelId, Arc<tokenizers::Tokenizer>>>>, ledger: Arc<ProcessLedgerIntegration> }`. CandleModelHandle is an enum: `Transformer { model: Box<dyn TransformerModel>, config: TransformerConfig, state: TransformerState }`, `Mamba2 { model: candle_transformers::models::mamba2::Model, state: Mamba2State }`, `RwkvV5 { model: ..., state: ... }`, `RwkvV6 { ... }`, `RwkvV7 { ... }`. (Mamba2/RWKV variants implemented in MT-085/MT-086/MT-087.) candle_core::Device selection per OS+GPU: try Cuda(0) if cuda feature enabled and available; fallback Metal(0) on macOS; fallback Cpu. Operator override via LoadSpec.device_override. Tokenizer cache: HF tokenizers crate loads `tokenizer.json` from the model directory; embedded in CandleModelHandle for fast access. impl ModelRuntime for CandleRuntime: load verifies RuntimeKind==Candle, sha256, mints ModelId v7, registers with ledger; generate/score/embed return NotImplemented (filled MT-082..MT-088); kv_cache returns Err CapabilityNotSupported for Mamba2/RWKV variants (they use state-vector cache, MT-088 separate handle), Default impl for Transformer variant; steering_hooks returns SteeringHookHandle backed by CandleSteeringHook (MT-082). All candle_core::* / candle_transformers::* identifiers MUST stay inside model_runtime/candle/**.
risk_if_missed: CandleRuntime cannot be wired into LlmClient; hook-requiring techniques and SSMs have no host.
validator_focus: Grep candle_core:: / candle_transformers:: only inside model_runtime/candle/**; Device selector respects operator override; ModelId v7.

minimum_controls: Device selector cuda-not-available path returns CPU fallback (no panic).
Cargo feature flags for cuda/metal documented so non-GPU builds compile.
